name: Pandit Rameshwar Shastri
bio: Pandit Rameshwar Shastri completed his Acharya from Sampurnanand Sanskrit University with specialization in Antyesti Paddhati. With over 22 years performing last rites across Uttar Pradesh, Delhi, and Punjab, he has guided more than 3,200 families through their most difficult hours.

name: Pandit Subramaniam Iyer
bio: Pandit Subramaniam Iyer is trained in the Southbound Apasthamba and Bodhayana funeral traditions. He has 18 years of experience conducting Tamil Brahmin and Telugu funeral rituals across Mumbai, Chennai, and Bangalore.

name: Pandit Debashish Bhattacharya
bio: Trained at the renowned Sanskrit College in Kolkata, Pandit Debashish Bhattacharya specializes in Bengali Hindu funeral traditions including the unique rituals of the Brahmin and Kayastha communities. Known for his calm, explanatory style.

name: Pandit Krishnamurthy Vedanta
bio: With 25 years of experience and over 4,100 ceremonies, Pandit Krishnamurthy Vedanta is one of our most senior pandits. He is deeply versed in the Madhwa and Smartha traditions of Karnataka and Andhra. His explanations in Kannada and Telugu are particularly valued by families.

name: Pandit Vishwanath Joshi
bio: Pandit Vishwanath Joshi has served Maharashtrian families across Pune, Mumbai, and Nashik for 19 years. He is particularly known for his knowledge of the unique customs of the Chitpavan Brahmin community and the Nagbali Narayan Nagbali ritual.

name: Pandit Jigar Trivedi
bio: Pandit Jigar Trivedi specializes in the Vaishnav and Shaiva traditions of Gujarat, with deep knowledge of the unique Gujarati mourning customs. He has conducted ceremonies for NRI Gujarati families returning from the UK and USA.

name: Pandit Arvind Kumar Mishra
bio: A Kashi Pandit of the highest credentials, Pandit Arvind Kumar Mishra has performed over 5,200 ceremonies over 27 years. He is one of a select group certified by the Kashi Vidwat Parishad for conducting Kashi-kshetra rituals and is our lead pandit for pilgrimage-based last rites.

name: Pandit Surjit Singh Bhatia
bio: Trained in the Arya Samaj reformist traditions as well as traditional Sanatani Punjabi rites, Pandit Surjit Singh Bhatia bridges both approaches. He is especially sought by families who want a simplified, non-elaborate Vedic ceremony.
